steps.title: Focus on shared information
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between Ephydra cinerea and Coccochloris. The relevant shared detail is that both live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice A discusses only the lake; Choice C mentions only Ephydra cinerea; Choice D mentions only Coccochloris. Choice B names both organisms and gives their shared location. The answer is B.
